sections: Canonical artifacts, renderer-derived views, and Projections
Flow resolver through Snapshot Memory rows
Instance profile and artifact kind/instance Projection integration fields

repo_truth: Live runtime remains limited to byte-budget flow selection, L0-L3 work-level filtering, and narrow pipeline capture/rollback/fingerprint primitives. No target Context Resolution, general Snapshot Memory, deterministic delta/projection, redaction/retention, or memory-promotion runtime exists. The complete HCM-0.3 subject changes only control-pack docs 02, 05, and 06; all runtime/open-program gates remain open and no Rust file changed. Current read-only checks pass YAML and Markdown fence parsing, semantic conformance probes, relative links, archive boundary, handoff validators/self-tests, and git diff --check.
allowed_scope: Read the exact authority sections and replay every subject_manifest entry against the live repository.
Review the complete current HCM-0.3 documentation/design freeze read-only for correctness, completeness, testability, determinism, security, and scope discipline.
Run read-only YAML, link, semantic-conformance, terminology, field-matrix, archive, handoff-validator, changed-path, GitNexus, and whitespace checks.
non_goals: No Rust/runtime implementation, runtime proof-gate promotion, shipped artifact/default selection, shipped Resolution label/default selection, HCM-0.4+ work, CLI/Tauri/Substrate/dock work, or synthesis.
No edits, commits, global handoff, ledger write, new dispatch, or user task hop by the reviewer.
Do not rely on parent implementation reasoning or treat illustrative examples as shipped product decisions.
tasks: Independently validate HCM-0.3 authority/dependency boundaries and replay the subject manifest byte-for-byte.

Verify the complete stack/envelope/escalation/promotion contract, every six-dimension/default comparison, mutation matcher outcome, parent/predecessor boundary, fingerprint producer, and positive/negative scenario.

Verify the complete generic Projection definition/request/result contract, exactly-one source closure, deterministic rule accounting and lossiness precedence, omission/proof effects, output/currentness evidence, authority effect, and renderer/synthesis separation.

Verify capture policy versus snapshot family/window equality, capture-local revisions/cursors, exact pre/captured/post and bounded evidence, predecessor applicability, state/record fingerprints, authority/admissibility, and redaction/retention tuple behavior.
Verify delta compatibility and complete family/change/signal accounting, plus specialized snapshot Projection conformance to every generic required field/rule/currentness/fingerprint requirement.

Verify every in-scope example key is covered by an owner/default/validation/non-goal matrix or the shared extension rule, examples are internally consistent, and no illustrative value freezes shipped product defaults.
Verify live precursor classifications and all runtime gates remain open, no Rust/sibling scope widened, and the HCM-0.3 proof gate remains design-only and independently reviewable.

Return findings first ordered Critical, Required, Optional, Nit with exact file/line, violated invariant/gate, smallest remediation, and missing verification. Return CLEAN only if no actionable finding remains.
contracts_and_gates: 04 HCM-0.3 exit gate and Phase 0 non-goals
05 HCM-0.3 exact contracts, field matrices, and conformance scenarios
stop_conditions: Return blocked if required authority, subject files, or validation infrastructure are unavailable.
Return a Required finding rather than selecting a shipped default or widening beyond HCM-0.3.
Do not modify repository state or write orchestration artifacts.
